Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 156 [SB Barutu Šumma Padanu 08 Commentary][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...]-u₂ x [...]

[...] ... [...]1

flake 2'2'

[...] 4u₂ MU-NI giš⸢TUKUL 15⸣ [...]

[...]. Its fourth line is, "A Weapon on the right [...]"

flake 3'3'

[... šum₄]-⸢ma⸣ ina ṣa-a-ti MU-NI ana IGI-ka [...]

[...]. If in a commentary its [...] line [...] in front of you [...]

flake 4'4'

[...] ⸢šal?⸣-šu₂ MU-NI gišTUKUL 15 GIM gišTUKUL ⸢15⸣ [...]

[...]. Its third line is, "A Weapon on the right (is) like the Weapon on the right [...]."

flake 5'5'

[šum₄]-ma gišTUKUL U 15 ke-pi U Uiš ana EREN₂-⸢ka⸣ [...]

If a Weapon on the right of the Finger is bent back (and) the Finger is pierced: for your army [...].

flake 6'6'

[...] gišTUKUL 15 GIM GUG₂gu-uk-ka ina ⸢EME⸣ [...]

[...] a Weapon on the right (is) like a kukku-cake on the tongue [...]

flake 7'7'

[...] MANu₂ MU-NI gišTUKUL 15 x [...]

[...]. Its second line is, "A Weapon on the right [...]"

flake 8'8'

[...] 3šu₂ MU-NI gišTUKUL ⸢15⸣ [...]

[...]. Its third line is, "A Weapon on the right [...]"

flake 9'9'

[...] x 4u₂ MU-NI gišTUKUL [...]

[...].... Its fourth line is, "A Weapon [...]."

flake 10'10'

[...] x gišTUKUL 15 15-šu₂ ⸢i⸣-[...]

[...] ... a Weapon on the right - its right ... [...]

flake 11'11'

[...] šum₄-ma i-na ṣa-a-⸢ti⸣ [...]

[...]. If in a commentary [...]

flake 12'12'

[...] MANu₂ MU-NI [...]

[...]. Its second line is, [...]

(traces of 1 line)
(rest of surface missing)

1 This fragment is almost certainly from the same tablet as SpTU 1 , 45.
